text: Maximoff located.
I know this is tech from the '80s but can we sharpen the visuals?
Working on it.
We can't see the drone on the broadcast. Wanda's framing it out of the shot.
Just like all the jump cuts.
Wanda decides what makes it onto her show and what doesn't.
You're up.
Wanda, this is Captain Monica Rambeau.
Can you hear me?
I just want to talk. That's it.
Well done.
Wait, my controls aren't working. Reconnect patch.
Disregard. Take the shot.
No joy!
What? No. The drone isn't armed.
Take the shot.
What did you do?
There's a breach, sir.
Is this yours?
The missile was just a precaution.
This will be your only warning.
Stay out of my home.
You can hardly blame us, Wanda.
Oh, I think I can.
You don't bother me. I won't bother you.
I wish it could be that simple.
You've taken an entire town hostage.
I'm not the one with the guns, Director.
But you are the one in control.
You're still here.
Wanda.
I didn't know the drones were armed.
But you know that, don't you?
A town full of civilians and you, a telepath, brought a SWORD Agent into your home.
You trusted me to help deliver your babies.
On some level, Wanda, you know I am an ally.
I wanna help you.
How? What could you possibly have to offer me?
What do you want?
I have what I want.
And no one will ever take it from me again.
Stand down!

- Wanda!
- Stand down!
Sir, the team is ready for launch.
It's about time.
Tried every type of power supply under the sun,
when all we needed was a little energy directly from the source.
Ready, sir.
